mapper.select: select cr.cert_id as certId, cr.contest_id as contestId, c.contest_name as contestName, c.category as category, ifnull(t.template_name, '获奖证书') as certName, cr.cert_no as certNo, s.award_level as awardLevel, cr.cert_file_url as certImageUrl, cr.cert_file_url as certFileUrl, p.name as holderName, cr.issue_time as issueTime, cr.issue_time as issueDate from jst_cert_record cr left join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = cr.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' left join jst_score_record s on s.score_id = cr.score_id and s.del_flag = '0' left join jst_participant p on p.participant_id = cr.participant_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join jst_cert_template t on t.template_id = cr.template_id and t.del_flag = '0' where cr.del_flag = '0' and cr.user_id = #{userId} and cr.issue_status in ('granted', 'issued') order by cr.issue_time desc, cr.cert_id desc
